scripts.build:mac: node scripts/fix-mac-builder-permissions.js && npm run icons && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac zip --arm64
scripts.build:win: node scripts/build-windows-helper.js && npm run icons && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win portable --x64
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run build:mac && npm run build:win && node scripts/prune-dist.js

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Accord needs microphone access for calls.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Accord can capture system audio when sound sharing is enabled.
